title: Repurposed Structures - Illager Invasion Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Illager Invasion's woodland mansions!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Illager Invasion. You will encounter Bashers, Provokers, Archivists, and Invokers in RS' mansions!

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here:
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge)
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)

- Illager Invasion mod can be obtained from here:
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion)

![An Invoker in a taiga mansion.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728499dc30aa7b4d7070c88a46a0a5eff81e9a95_0.webp)

**You are free to use this in your modpack. I claim no affiliation with the authors of Repurposed Structures or Illager Invasion. For support, suggestions, and ideas, [I have a discord server.](https://discord.gg/XmuvqYQGmY)**
